title: Windows 95 Plus!
description: A vanilla-friendly resource pack that turns Minecraft into Windows 95 with Microsoft Plus! — pink UI, setup wizard loading screen, and retro vibes with BTB Shader + High Contrast.
body:
![Minecraft 95 Plus!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dc72708d2051ba3e47e746052eb36c9a1b7018c.png)

# Minecraft 95 Plus

Welcome to **Minecraft 95 Plus** — a **vanilla-friendly resource pack** that transforms Minecraft into a nostalgic throwback to **Windows 95 + Microsoft Plus!**  

This pack adds:  
- 🖥️ **Windows 95–inspired UI**  
- 🎨 **Pink retro aesthetic**  
- 📂 **Setup Wizard–style loading screen**  
- 🟪 **High Contrast visuals**  
- 🕹️ **Retro performance modes** (requires FPS cap + shader setup)  

---

## 🎮 Retro Experience Guide

All modes require:  
- ✅ **High Contrast ON**  
- ✅ **BTB Shader (Back To Basics, PS1-style)**  

### Modes:  
- **Win95 Emulation Mode** → 10 FPS cap  
- **Pentium III Mode** → 20 FPS cap  
- **CRT Smooth Mode** → 30 FPS cap  
- **Windows ME Chaos Mode** → Random stutters + fake crash vibes (Coming soon...)

---

## 📦 Compatibility  
- ✔️ Works with **Minecraft 1.21+**  
- ✔️ No mods required (resource pack only)  
- ⚡ For the full retro vibe, use with **Iris/Oculus shaders** + BTB Shader.  

---

## 📸 Screenshots  
![Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb46647e4b46a01b83c8df415d896c18d2b551b3.png)
![in-game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2405a8f70dc9aedc3d913df18103fe1d01d2be7f.png)
---

## 📥 Installation  
1. Download the `.zip` file.  
2. Place it in your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder.  
3. Enable it in the Resource Packs menu.  
4. (Optional but recommended) Enable High Contrast + BTB Shader for the full experience.  

---

## 🔗 Distribution  
- Available on **Modrinth** and **CurseForge**.  
- Free to use, but please credit if showcased in videos/streams.  

---

👾 *Step back in time — Minecraft has never looked this retro and cursed before.*
